unsupported_path_guidance: For unsupported paths, stay within the documented public v1 surface: GET /v1/status, GET /v1/subscriptions, GET /v1/items, GET /v1/items/{item_id}, GET /v1/integrations/telegram, and the documented write paths for subscriptions, Telegram integration, uploads, and artifacts. Prefer high-level commands such as feedcontext auth status, feedcontext auth logout, feedcontext auth login, feedcontext subscription list, feedcontext subscription add/delete, item commands, integration commands, and artifact commands before raw API calls. If a new public route is required, update the published CLI and actions/api.md together.
write_refused_guidance: Write actions are refused unless the host has approved the mutation and the CLI command includes --confirm. After approval, retry the documented high-level write command or an allowed raw v1 write path with --confirm; do not bypass the host approval plus --confirm safety contract.
